name: Strategy Reasoning
description: Structured strategic analysis: situation assessment, option generation, trade-off evaluation, recommendation with rationale and risk mitigation.

inputs.name: situation
inputs.description: Business situation, challenge, or decision to analyze

outputs.name: situation_analysis
outputs.description: Structured assessment of current state, key factors, and dynamics

outputs.name: options
outputs.description: 3-5 strategic options with pros, cons, effort, and expected impact

outputs.name: trade_offs
outputs.description: Key trade-offs between options with evaluation criteria

outputs.name: recommendation
outputs.description: Recommended option with detailed rationale and confidence level

outputs.name: next_steps
outputs.description: Concrete next actions with owners and timelines

quality_checks.name: options_diverse
quality_checks.description: At least 3 genuinely different strategic options

quality_checks.name: recommendation_justified
quality_checks.description: Recommendation includes clear rationale tied to trade-offs
